name: Strawberry Frozen Fruit Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the crushed pineapple and juice in a blender.
2. Add the frozen bananas a little at a time, blending between each addition.
3. Add the frozen strawberries a little at a time, blending between each addition.
4. Scoop into dessert dishes and freeze for 15 to 30 minutes.
5. If frozen for longer periods of time, remove from freezer a few minutes before serving to soften.
